prior_context.text: Moving to the door, Sally looks at the head coach and grins.

options: Sally greets Lisa in the hallway.
The head coach greets Sally in the hallway.
Sally talks to the principal in the hallway.
Lisa greets Sally in the hallway.
answer_text: Sally greets Lisa in the hallway.

question: What happens next?
